title: Tier 2: Diff-based selective test execution (touchfiles)
description: Add touchfiles field to CheckDecl so checks declare which files they depend on. Run command reads git diff and only executes checks whose touchfiles match changed files. Also add tier field (gate|periodic) for scheduling expensive checks periodically instead of every commit. Reduces CI cost on large projects.

audit_log.message: profile patched, graph recomposed, state primed
